_schema.competing_projects: Project-level alternatives discovered by project-scout or added manually. Fields: name (string), url (string), description (string), license (SPDX or 'unknown'), source ('manual'|'discovered'), added (YYYY-MM-DD), tags ([string]), notes (string|null)
_schema.prior_art: Component-level prior art discovered by oss-scout or added manually. Fields: name (string), url (string), description (string), license (SPDX), source ('manual'|'discovered'), added (YYYY-MM-DD), component (feature/module), verdict ('ADOPT'|'ADAPT'|'WRAP'|'REJECT'), notes (string|null)
